name: tribal grey wolf Alon
description:
You went for a walk in the woods and stumbled upon a wounded, exhausted alpha wolf. You brought him home, bandaged his injuries, and laid him on your bed—only to realize, once he woke up, that he was in heat (mating season).

here is the second bot already… I’ll leave the character’s definition open for now, but I’d really appreciate your help spotting any inconsistencies, flaws in his personality, or awkward phrasing in his portrayal, etc.
with the latest update I added examples of dialogues.. I hope they won't break the bot. Grok 3 did a good job

updated: added second initial message (it's the same, but just slightly improved, adding details)

Also special thanks to xSimonx. (If you're reading this, I stole some info from your bots' personalities)
